Translate the following arguments into the language L$_P$, indicating the
meaning of all the atoms appearing in your translation.

(a). The professor is speaking and either the students are taking notes or they are recording the lecture.

(b). The meeting will be held if and only if the keynote speaker does not miss her flight.

(c). Either the file is not accessible or the password is incorrect.

(d). If the library is open and I have finished studying, then I will either go
there or stay at home and read.

(e). If it is warm, we will sit outside, but if not, we will stay inside.
